evaluations.name: Continuous Critical Base Load
evaluations.recommendation: Normal pattern — validate backup power covers base critical load.

evaluations.name: Shift Change Spike Pattern
evaluations.recommendation: Validate medical equipment activation follows shift handover protocols.

evaluations.name: Demand Spike Detection
evaluations.message: Peak demand is 1.5x the average — opportunity to flatten load curve.
evaluations.recommendation: Implement demand response: stagger HVAC start, shift non-critical loads.

evaluations.name: Steam/Hot Water Proportion
evaluations.recommendation: Consider low-energy sterilization alternatives for non-critical equipment.

evaluations.name: Weather Sensitivity Check
evaluations.message: Energy use is 9% correlated with outdoor temperature.
evaluations.recommendation: Optimize HVAC based on temperature forecast to reduce reactive energy spikes.

evaluations.name: Humidity Control Load
evaluations.message: Humidity-driven energy load detected — forecast-based HVAC can reduce cost.
evaluations.recommendation: Pre-emptive dehumidification during forecasted humid days saves reactive load.

evaluations.name: Unexpected Consumption Drop
evaluations.recommendation: URGENT: Verify no equipment failure or power supply interruption.
